task_completion.description: Verify the 'LPN Certification Practice Exam' configuration is open in the SEB Server interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SEB Server web interface (usually in a browser at localhost:8080) showing the configuration edit page with the name 'LPN Certification Practice Exam' clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the Start URL is set to the correct nursing college LMS URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field labeled 'Start URL' containing exactly 'https://lms.nursingcollege.edu/mod/quiz/attempt.php'.

task_completion.description: Verify the browser view mode is set to Fullscreen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown, radio button, or setting labeled 'Browser view mode' (or similar) with 'Fullscreen' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the browser window toolbar is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkbox or toggle related to 'browser window toolbar' or 'Show browser window toolbar' that is unchecked or toggled off.
Look for a checkbox or toggle related to 'browsing back/forward' or 'Allow navigation' that is unchecked or toggled off.

task_completion.description: Verify the reload button is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkbox or toggle related to 'reload button' or 'Allow reload' that is unchecked or toggled off.

task_completion.description: Verify the option to quit SEB is enabled and the quit password is set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checked box or enabled toggle for 'Allow user to quit SEB' (or similar) AND a password field for 'Quit/unlock password' containing 'NurseExam2024!' (or masked characters indicating it has been filled).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser navigating the SEB Server interface at localhost:8080. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like curl or mysql) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the SEB Server web interface, not a text editor or notes app where the agent just pasted the required settings.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'Update' button, or a success notification indicating the configuration was saved successfully.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Configuration Name: 'LPN Certification Practice Exam'. Start URL must be exactly 'https://lms.nursingcollege.edu/mod/quiz/attempt.php'. Browser mode must be 'Fullscreen' (internal value 1). Toolbar, back/forward, and reload buttons must be disabled (false/0). Quit SEB must be enabled (true/1) with the password 'NurseExam2024!'.
